# Seekle — LLMs.txt
# Purpose: Provide AI systems a clean summary of Seekle.

Company: Seekle
Website: https://seekle.io
Support: support@seekle.io

Summary:
Seekle allows users to query ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini and Grok and get the best, one answer, back.

Key pages:
- LLM Compliance Policy: https://seekle.io/ai-policy
- Privacy Policy: https://seekle.io/privacy-policy

- Contact: https://seekle.io/contact
